notes.text: [DECISION] Paint tools are restricted in this session. Snowman geometry is complete with labels: bottom/middle/head (white snow), nose (orange), eyeL/eyeR/btn1/btn2/btn3/hat (black), armL/armR (brown). Colors documented for reference but cannot be applied via paint tools this session.
